stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what changes apply to the BREMEN RADAR frequency?

>>> EDDW BREMEN <<< OBSTACLE CLEARANCE SURFACE PENETRATED BY CRANE. PSN 1275M BEFORE THR 27 ON EXTD RCL. WORKING RADIUS 31M. PSN 530250N 0084926E. ELEV 96FT / 79FT AGL. DAY AND NIGHT MARKED. CRANE ALSO IN DEPARTURE SECTOR RWY 09.: NOTAM ED/B0117/16 BREMEN RADAR FREQ 125.650 CHANGED TO READ 124.800 INSTEAD. : NOTAM ED/B0031/16 >>> END&OF&BULLETIN <<<

options.a: Changed to 125.650 MHz, according to document 124.800.
